vourcher_no.text: เลขที่ใบสำคัญ

root.sql:
SELECT (select coop_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as coop_name, (select manager_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as manager_name, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_fin_vourcher_detail.ref_memno ) as member_name, sc_fin_vourcher_head.vourcher_no, sc_fin_vourcher_head.vourcher_group, (select vourcher_desc from sc_fin_ucf_vourcher_group where vourcher_group = sc_fin_vourcher_head.vourcher_group ) as vourcher_group_name, sc_fin_vourcher_head.operate_date, sc_fin_vourcher_head.vourcher_desc, sc_fin_vourcher_detail.ref_memno, sc_fin_vourcher_head.vourcher_owner, sc_fin_vourcher_head.vourcher_name, sc_fin_vourcher_head.journal_date, sc_fin_vourcher_detail.account_id, sc_fin_vourcher_head.vourcher_value, ( SELECT sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name FROM sc_acc_m_account_master WHERE account_id = sc_fin_vourcher_detail.account_id and sc_acc_m_account_master.account_type_id = '3' ) as account_name ,
case when sc_fin_vourcher_head.ref_system = 'FBK' then ' ' when sc_fin_vourcher_head.ref_system = 'FBR' then ' ' else decode( FPA_FIN_VALID_BANK_FIN( sc_fin_vourcher_detail.account_tr ) , ' ' , sc_fin_vourcher_detail.account_tr , ' ' ) end as account_tr , ( SELECT sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name FROM sc_acc_m_account_master WHERE account_id = sc_fin_vourcher_detail.account_tr and sc_acc_m_account_master.account_type_id = '3' ) as account_tr_name ,
sc_fin_vourcher_detail.pay_type, sc_fin_vourcher_detail.seq_no, sc_fin_vourcher_head.entry_fin , pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai (sc_fin_vourcher_head.vourcher_value) as thai_vourcher_value,
TRUNC( sum(sc_fin_vourcher_detail.item_amount)) as item_amount_a ,mod( sum( sc_fin_vourcher_detail.item_amount) , 1 ) * 100 as item_amount_b ,pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai ( sum( sc_fin_vourcher_detail.item_amount )) as thai_item_amount ,si_security_user.user_name FROM sc_fin_vourcher_head, sc_fin_vourcher_detail ,si_security_user WHERE ( sc_fin_vourcher_head.vourcher_no = sc_fin_vourcher_detail.vourcher_no ) and sc_fin_vourcher_head.entry_fin = si_security_user.user_id and sc_fin_vourcher_detail.account_id is not null --and sc_fin_vourcher_detail.pay_type = 'C' --เงินสด /*WHERE*/ --and ( sc_fin_vourcher_head.vourcher_no = 'P65000228' ) group by sc_fin_vourcher_head.vourcher_no, sc_fin_vourcher_head.operate_date, sc_fin_vourcher_head.vourcher_owner, sc_fin_vourcher_detail.ref_memno, sc_fin_vourcher_head.vourcher_name, sc_fin_vourcher_head.vourcher_desc, sc_fin_vourcher_head.journal_date, sc_fin_vourcher_detail.account_id, sc_fin_vourcher_detail.item_amount, sc_fin_vourcher_head.vourcher_value, sc_fin_vourcher_head.vourcher_group, case when sc_fin_vourcher_head.ref_system = 'FBK' then ' ' when sc_fin_vourcher_head.ref_system = 'FBR' then ' ' else decode( FPA_FIN_VALID_BANK_FIN( sc_fin_vourcher_detail.account_tr ) , ' ' , sc_fin_vourcher_detail.account_tr , ' ' ) end , sc_fin_vourcher_detail.pay_type, sc_fin_vourcher_detail.seq_no, sc_fin_vourcher_head.entry_fin ,sc_fin_vourcher_detail.remark ,si_security_user.user_name ,sc_fin_vourcher_detail.account_tr
order by sc_fin_vourcher_detail.seq_no

r_amnat_form_paymentvoucher_nest.sql: SELECT pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_fin_vourcher_detail.ref_memno ) as member_name, sc_fin_vourcher_head.vourcher_value, sc_fin_vourcher_detail.item_amount, TRUNC(sc_fin_vourcher_detail.item_amount) as item_amount_a ,mod( sum( sc_fin_vourcher_detail.item_amount) , 1 ) * 100 as item_amount_b FROM sc_fin_vourcher_head, sc_fin_vourcher_detail WHERE ( sc_fin_vourcher_head.vourcher_no = sc_fin_vourcher_detail.vourcher_no ) --and sc_fin_vourcher_detail.pay_type = 'C' --เงินสด /*WHERE*/ and sc_fin_vourcher_head.vourcher_no = {0} group by sc_fin_vourcher_detail.ref_memno, sc_fin_vourcher_detail.item_amount, sc_fin_vourcher_detail.seq_no, sc_fin_vourcher_head.vourcher_value
